  • [ - ] Zoltan - member since 15-Feb-20

    After 45 minutes: 3-1 and 2-0 is the shots to hit the target ratio. It is ridiculous. The ball gets knocked forward and then back because players are incapable of going forward continuously: they have actually been trained to mindlessly play back the ball immediately. Those are the kind of coaches that are hired today: no idea about attacking football and totally disrespecting the fans. Last, but not least, players trained this way develop a style of playing in which they are unable to center the ball, to shoot from a distance, and to play a one touch game: they keep taking too many touches, they think slowly, and they are basically scared from the opposition!

  • [ - ] Zoltan - member since 15-Feb-20

    You, Anglo-Saxons (England, USA, Wales) need to look into yourselves and ask the following question: is football about all the defensive garbage your teams represent, possession and dominating the game, or is it rather about scoring goals and entertaining the fans??? Just look at this game today: in the 38 th minute the US hit the goal the first time after just 3 attempts, while Wales had 1 attempt with 0 hitting on target. Just what do you guys think when you criticise me when I lose my temper and bash all the garbage I see??? Are you your own worse enemy?
